title: WoKFlows
description: The WoK-Flows 128x Resource Pack is a high-quality version of the WoK-Flows pack, designed to deliver detailed and immersive visuals while ensuring smooth gameplay. Perfect for players who want a richer graphical experience, designed for World of Keralis.
body:
The WoK-Flows Resource Pack is designed to enhance the World of Keralis server with high-quality, detailed textures and improved performance. Available in HD 128x and Lite 64x versions, this pack offers flexibility for players, providing either a visually stunning experience or a more optimized performance for smoother gameplay.

The HD 128x version offers sharp, detailed textures for those seeking a more immersive look, while the Lite 64x version ensures faster performance, ideal for lower-end systems or players who prioritize speed without sacrificing too much visual quality.

_**We also offer a one-click install modpack through modrinth with performance enhancing mods**_ **[here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wokpack/version/latest).**
